Document:
# Proto-Reptile
lizord
## Changes from the "Protogen" base species. Values listed replace "Protogen" values of that damage catagory, they do not stack ontop of them.
- Receive [color=#1e90ff]20% more cold damage[/color], [color=#ffa500]50% less heat damage[/color] and [color=#B9BF93]10% less slash damage[/color].
